prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large yellow metal sphere
  - obj_1: large brown rubber cube
  - obj_2: small brown metal cube
  - obj_3: small yellow metal sphere
  - obj_4: small gray metal cylinder
  - obj_5: small yellow rubber cylinder
  - obj_6: large yellow metal sphere
  - obj_7: large red rubber sphere
  - obj_8: small cyan metal cube
  - obj_9: large gray rubber cube

Questions:
[qrr_0441] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0442] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_8 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0443] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0444] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0445] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0446] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0447] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0448] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0449] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0450] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0451] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0452] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0453] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0454] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_8 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0455] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0456] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0457] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0458] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0459] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0460] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >

Let me identify the objects from the images and estimate their 3D positions:

- obj_0: large yellow metal sphere (back-left area)
- obj_1: large brown rubber cube (center)
- obj_2: small brown metal cube (front-left or front area)
- obj_3: small yellow metal sphere (front-center)
- obj_4: small gray metal cylinder (center-front)
- obj_5: small yellow rubber cylinder (center area)
- obj_6: large yellow metal sphere (back area)
- obj_7: large red rubber sphere (back area)
- obj_8: small cyan metal cube (right area)
- obj_9: large gray rubber cube (right area)

- obj_8 (cyan cube): (~1, 0, 0)

Let me compute distances:
